title: Custom OCR Service & RPA Engine
subtitle: AI-powered Document Processing
description: Engineered an AI-powered OCR microservice migrating legacy infrastructure to Google Gemini AI; built a custom RPA engine with Python parallel worker pools to automate multi-page shipping invoices ingestion, achieving high data fidelity on complex logistics edge cases.
tech_stack: Python, Flask, Gemini API, PyMuPDF, Threading

title: The Pilot System: Autonomous Agent & PR Automator
subtitle: AI-Augmented DevEx & Workflow Infrastructure
description: Architected and deployed an autonomous internal engineering workflow wrapper on a Hostinger VPS utilizing Claude Code CLI and Asana webhooks, enabling self-orchestrating developer pipelines with max reasoning effort settings. Designed agentic automation mechanisms that integrate Asana triggers with parallel worker processes to auto-orchestrate workflows, alongside CI/CD lifecycle pipelines that parse commit messages, run four-layer test suites, execute AI-driven code reviews, and construct pull requests automatically.
tech_stack: Claude Code, Python, Asana Webhooks, Hostinger VPS, GitHub Actions

title: CEISA & INSW Customs Gateway
subtitle: Logistics Backend Services
description: Developed concurrent Go/Gin backend compliance pipelines executing PEB/PIB declarations, integrating national customs and electronic Certificate-of-Origin (INSW) APIs with resilient fan-out caching and fallback schedulers.
tech_stack: Go, Gin, PostgreSQL, Redis, REST APIs

title: Critical Web Applications
subtitle: Tokopedia Plus Core Services
description: Developed and maintained high-performance microservices for a premium subscription platform (Tokopedia Plus) using Golang, gRPC, GraphQL, NSQ, and Redis. Focused on optimizing database query caching, streamlining landing page and subscription logic APIs, and establishing resilient inter-service communication patterns under high traffic.
tech_stack: Golang, gRPC, GraphQL, Redis, NSQ, Datadog
